issues_found.description: Pre-existing: API route logger names use inconsistent patterns - 'interrupt' (missing api/ prefix) and 'api-search' (uses hyphen instead of slash). Not part of Issue #480 scope.
tests/integration/api-search.test.ts defines its own local logger mock (missing 'debug' method) instead of using shared tests/helpers/logger-mock.ts. Pre-existing, not part of Issue #480.

observations: conversation-logger.ts: createLogger('conversation-logger') follows the kebab-case module naming convention consistently
conversation-logger.ts: action name 'conversation:log-failed' follows the 'verb:target' pattern correctly
tests/helpers/logger-mock.ts: createMockLogger() includes all 4 log methods (debug/info/warn/error) plus withContext with chaining - matches Logger interface
tests/helpers/logger-mock.ts: setupLoggerMock() provides both mockLogger and mockModule for flexible test usage
No unused imports detected in Issue #480 target files
No raw console.log calls in conversation-logger.ts
17 test files still use inline logger mocks instead of shared helper - gradual migration recommended in future issues
